compounddef.innerclass: Boon::has_awake< T, std::void_t< decltype(std::declval< T >().Awake(std::declval< GameObject & >()))> >
Boon::has_onendplay< T, std::void_t< decltype(std::declval< T >().OnEndPlay(std::declval< GameObject & >()))> >
Boon::has_update< T, std::void_t< decltype(std::declval< T >().Update(std::declval< GameObject & >()))> >
Boon::has_fixedupdate< T, std::void_t< decltype(std::declval< T >().FixedUpdate(std::declval< GameObject & >()))> >
Boon::has_lateupdate< T, std::void_t< decltype(std::declval< T >().LateUpdate(std::declval< GameObject & >()))> >
Boon::has_onbeginoverlap< T, std::void_t< decltype(std::declval< T >().OnBeginOverlap(std::declval< GameObject & >(), std::declval< GameObject & >()))> >
Boon::has_onendoverlap< T, std::void_t< decltype(std::declval< T >().OnEndOverlap(std::declval< GameObject & >(), std::declval< GameObject & >()))> >

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *, const char *, const char *, int)
memberdef.name: BnAssertFail

detaileddescription.para: This function is called when an assertion (BN_ASSERT) fails. The default implementation triggers a debug break. Consumers may replace or extend this behavior by providing their own implementation.

parameterdescription.para: Textual representation of the failed expression.
Optional message provided to the assert macro.
Source file where the assertion failed.

briefdescription.para: Bitmask categories used to classify events.
Register reflection information for type T into the provided registry.

detaileddescription.para: This function populates a static BClass instance for T, sets lifecycle and component helper callbacks when available (detected via compile-time traits) and registers the BClass with the provided registry.

parameterdescription.para: Registry to insert the BClass into.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the registered BClass instance.
